$schema_note: Single source of truth for EB-5 risk scoring. Read by skills/eb5-scoring/SKILL.md (to compute) and scripts/render_report.ps1 (to render). Scores are 0 = lowest risk (best) .. 100 = highest risk (worst).

confidence_scale.3: High — primary government or court record (USCIS RC list/termination, I-956F notice, SEC EDGAR filing, PACER docket).
confidence_scale.2: Medium — reputable independent third party (established trade press, independent market data, county recorder, third-party audited financials).
confidence_scale.1: Low — single uncorroborated weak third-party source, or issuer doc corroborated by one weak signal.
confidence_scale.0: None — only the issuer's own marketing/PPM, or nothing at all. Claim is UNVERIFIABLE.

verdict_credit_rule: A claim may only earn confidence >= 2 (and a non-penalized sub-score) if corroborated by a NON-ISSUER source of tier >= 2. The issuer corroborating itself does not count. Otherwise the claim is downgraded to UNVERIFIABLE (confidence 0).

immigration_factors.name: Regional Center good standing
immigration_factors.good: Active and in good standing on the USCIS approved RC list.
immigration_factors.primary_source: USCIS approved RC list + termination list

immigration_factors.name: Job-creation methodology & cushion
immigration_factors.good: >=30-50% job cushion above the 10-jobs-per-investor requirement with defensible RIMS-II/IMPLAN inputs.
immigration_factors.bad: Thin/zero cushion, expenditure-only jobs, inflated multipliers.
immigration_factors.primary_source: Economic report re-derived vs independent multipliers

immigration_factors.name: TEA / set-aside qualification validity
immigration_factors.good: Rural / high-unemployment / infrastructure set-aside independently confirmed (Census/BLS/USCIS designation).
immigration_factors.bad: Gerrymandered or expired designation, or unverifiable.
immigration_factors.primary_source: Census ACS, BLS LAUS, USCIS TEA guidance

immigration_factors.name: Sustainment / at-risk 2-yr rule (RIA)
immigration_factors.good: Capital deployed and sustained >=2 years from investment per RIA; clear at-risk structure.
immigration_factors.bad: Ambiguous deployment timing or early-return features that break at-risk.
immigration_factors.primary_source: PPM terms re-checked vs RIA; deployment evidence

immigration_factors.name: Redeployment terms
immigration_factors.good: Same-RC, NCE-consistent, geographically permissible redeployment with investor protections.

immigration_factors.name: I-526E / I-829 approval track record
immigration_factors.good: RC/sponsor has prior I-829 (conditions removed) approvals.
immigration_factors.bad: No track record or a pattern of prior denials/RFEs.

immigration_factors.name: RIA compliance: fund admin, audits, securities
immigration_factors.good: Independent fund administrator + annual audit + I-956G filings + securities compliance.
immigration_factors.bad: No fund admin, no audit, securities red flags.

immigration_factors.name: Source-of-funds independence / integrity
immigration_factors.good: Standard, well-documented SOF pathway; no sanctioned jurisdictions.
immigration_factors.bad: Opaque/structured SOF guidance from the issuer.
immigration_factors.primary_source: Issuer SOF guidance vs sanctions/AML norms

financial_factors.name: Capital-stack position & EB-5 %
financial_factors.good: EB-5 is a modest slice with senior debt and meaningful sponsor equity; EB-5 is not the first-loss tranche.
financial_factors.bad: EB-5 is the de-facto equity / first-loss and >50% of the stack.
financial_factors.primary_source: PPM/I-526E cap table vs title/lender records

financial_factors.name: Loan vs equity model & terms
financial_factors.good: Senior or well-secured loan, market rate, clear maturity.
financial_factors.bad: Unsecured/subordinated equity with no defined exit.

financial_factors.name: Collateral & guarantees
financial_factors.good: Recorded first-lien collateral; completion + repayment guarantees from a creditworthy guarantor.
financial_factors.bad: Unsecured, no guarantee, or guarantor is the same shell.

financial_factors.name: Developer track record & balance sheet
financial_factors.good: Long completed-project history, audited balance sheet, no defaults.
financial_factors.bad: First-timer, prior defaults/bankruptcies, thin balance sheet.

financial_factors.name: Construction / completion risk
financial_factors.good: Permitted, GMP contract, bonded GC, low entitlement risk.
financial_factors.bad: Pre-entitlement, no permits, single-source GC, cost-overrun exposure.

financial_factors.name: Market / demand risk
financial_factors.good: Independent market study supports absorption/occupancy; diversified demand.
financial_factors.bad: Speculative demand, single tenant, oversupplied submarket.
financial_factors.primary_source: Independent market data vs issuer study

financial_factors.name: Repayment / takeout source
financial_factors.good: Identified takeout (refi/sale) with conservative LTV and DSCR.
financial_factors.bad: 'We'll refinance later' with no committed takeout.

financial_factors.name: Escrow & redeployment (financial)
financial_factors.good: Funds in escrow until I-526E/material milestone; conservative redeployment.
financial_factors.bad: Funds released immediately to sponsor; aggressive redeployment.

financial_factors.name: Fees & conflicts of interest
financial_factors.good: Arm's-length, disclosed, market fees; no self-dealing.
financial_factors.bad: Stacked admin/origination/management fees to affiliates; related-party leases.

financial_factors.name: Return-of-capital / distribution history
financial_factors.good: Sponsor has returned EB-5 capital on prior deals.
financial_factors.bad: No returns yet, or capital stuck in redeployment loops.

uncertainty_surcharge.explanation: Computed separately for the immigration factors and the financial factors using that score's average per-factor confidence. Added to the weighted composite. This is the 'do not trust issuer paper' penalty.

confidence_floor.effect: If overall average confidence < 1.5, the verdict is capped at CONDITIONAL and a 'verdict limited by data gaps' banner is shown.

verdict.conditional_requirement: Every CONDITIONAL verdict must enumerate the specific conditions that would move it to GO.

hard_gates.name: RC terminated or debarred
hard_gates.trigger: Regional center appears on the USCIS termination list or principals are debarred.

hard_gates.name: I-956F denied or withdrawn
hard_gates.trigger: The project's I-956F was denied or withdrawn.

hard_gates.name: SEC / fraud enforcement vs principals
hard_gates.trigger: An SEC enforcement action, fraud injunction, or criminal action against the principals/sponsor.

hard_gates.name: Proven TEA / set-aside misqualification
hard_gates.trigger: The reserved-category set-aside is provably invalid or expired.

hard_gates.name: Confirmed material misrepresentation
hard_gates.trigger: A material claim is CONTRADICTED and the adversarial pass confirms it with a second independent source.
